creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Anyone seeing this, can you please try and apply
   https://reviews.freebsd.org/D49734
to your tree and report back if it helps?
If you are not using arc you can download the entire diff on the right side "Download raw diff".

It's a first start adjusting locking in LinuxKPI 802.11 and around the chanctx; there may be more work todo around "link_conf" which we don't fully support yet as we always only have one link.
